calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Frisco ISD in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Frisco ISD is Wednesday, August 13, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Frisco ISD in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Frisco ISD is Friday, May 22, 2026. The school year runs from August through May, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Frisco ISD?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Frisco ISD runs March 9–13, 2026 — a full week off. Good Friday (April 3) is an additional student holiday, creating a long Easter weekend two weeks later.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Frisco ISD?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Frisco ISD runs December 22, 2025–January 2, 2026 (12 days). A student holiday falls on January 5, so students return Tuesday, January 6, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2025-2026 for Frisco ISD?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Frisco ISD runs November 24–28, 2025 (Monday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 27. School resumes Monday, December 1, 2025.

yearNumbers.label: 4-Quarter Year
yearNumbers.detail: Frisco ISD operates on a four-quarter grading structure within 2 semesters, unlike the simple two-semester calendar used by most Texas districts.

yearNumbers.label: Make-Up Days
yearNumbers.detail: Three bad-weather make-up days (Apr 6, Apr 30, May 1) are pre-scheduled as regular school days unless winter closures require them for makeup.

yearNumbers.label: Good Friday
yearNumbers.detail: Good Friday is listed as a student holiday, extending the Easter weekend to four consecutive days off for families.

calendarNotes: The 2025–2026 school year runs from August 13, 2025, through May 22, 2026. Spring Break falls March 9–13. Good Friday (April 3) is a student holiday, falling the Friday before Easter weekend. Three bad weather make-up days are pre-scheduled on the calendar — April 6, April 30, and May 1 — each a school day unless winter weather closures earlier in the year require them for makeup.
